The '''Protodeka''' was a prototype [[Droid/Legends|droid]] mobile ground siege weapon designed by a [[Unidentified Colicoid engineer|Colicoid engineer]] and manufactured by [[Geonosian/Legends|Geonosians]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Raxus Prime/Legends|Raxus Prime]] that was used by the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independant Systems]] during the [[Dark Reaper crisis]].

==Description==
A giant, [[Crab/Legends|crablike]] [[Droid/Legends|droid]]<ref name="Protodeka" /> prototype, the Protodeka was slow, heavily [[Armor/Legends|armored]] mobile ground siege weapon. It had a slow turn rate, but pursued its target to exhaustion. It was equipped with massive [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannons]] and a lethal [[homing concussion missile]]s, which had a long seek [[Time/Legends|time]]<ref name="TCWPG" /> and range but were very slow. The droid was also armed with a powerful [[Claw/Legends|claw]] to grab enemy targets that wandered too close.<ref name="Protodeka" /> As initial Protodeka prototypes were vulnerable to attack from behind and at close range, [[Geonosian/Legends|Geonosian]] [[Engineer/Legends|engineers]] added a special short-range area-effect [[Seismic wave emitter|seismic pulse weapon]] that shattered ground units within range.<ref name="TCWPG" />

==History==
The Protodeka was designed by a [[Unidentified Colicoid engineer|Colicoid engineer]]<ref name="The New Essential Chronology" /> and manufactured by Geonosians<ref name="TCWPG" /> on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Raxus Prime/Legends|Raxus Prime]].<ref name="Protodeka" /> During the [[Dark Reaper crisis]], the Protodeka saw action on Raxus Prime and the planet [[Thule/Legends|Thule]], where a pair defended both [[Count/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]] and the ancient [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] city of [[Kesiak]], which contained the [[Dark Reaper]]. They were destroyed by [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] on Raxus Prime, and [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]] and [[Luminara Unduli/Legends|Luminara Unduli]] on Thule, where each of the victors utilized the [[TX-130 Saber-class fighter tank/Legends|TX-130 ''Saber''-class fighter tanks]] to win their respective battles against the droid.<ref name="The Clone Wars" />

Designed to turn the tide in favor of the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy]], the Protodeka turned out to be too expensive to mass-produce, so only a few were built. After the Dark Reaper crisis, the Protodeka's [[Colicoid/Legends|Colicoid]] designer was sealed away within the [[Fortress of Axion]].<ref name="The New Essential Chronology" />
